description_long: This object is a delicate circular band adorned with evenly spaced, five-petaled blue and purple flowers, each featuring a yellow center. The flowers are attached to a thin, metallic-looking ring, giving the appearance of a floral crown or garland. The petals are radially arranged and exhibit a subtle gradient from blue at the edges to a lighter purple near the center. The band itself is slender and silvery, with the flowers mounted upright along its circumference. No stems or leaves are visible, and the back of each flower is a flat, silvery disc. The overall design is ornamental and lightweight, suitable for decorative or wearable use.
description: A circular metallic band decorated with evenly spaced, five-petaled blue and purple flowers with yellow centers. The flowers are radially arranged and attached upright along the ring.
description_view_0: The band is seen at an angle, highlighting three prominent blue flowers with yellow centers and showing the silvery backs of the flowers on the far side.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full arc of the band with all blue and purple flowers visible, emphasizing their radial symmetry and even spacing.
description_view_2: The band is viewed from the opposite angle of view 0, again showing three main flowers in the foreground and the silvery backs of the flowers on the far side.
description_view_3: A rear view where only the silvery backs of the flowers are visible, with no color or petal detail apparent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with five petals per flower evenly spaced around a central yellow disk. The arrangement is symmetrical and the petals do not overlap.
